testcase.name: test_generate_plan
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fitforge_api.py:134: in test_generate_plan assert r.status_code == 200, f"body={r.text[:400]}" E AssertionError: body={"detail":"Claude returned non-JSON. Try again."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_latest_plan

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing plan sections: ['targets', 'meal_plan'] assert not ['targets', 'meal_plan']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fitforge_api.py:144: in test_latest_plan _validate_plan(data["plan"]) backend/tests/test_fitforge_api.py:94: in _validate_plan assert not missing, f"Missing plan sections: {missing}" E AssertionError: Missing plan sections: ['targets', 'meal_plan'] E assert not ['targets', 'meal_plan']

testcase.name: test_upload_image
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fitforge_api.py:243: in test_upload_image assert r.status_code == 200, r.text[:400] E AssertionError: {"detail":"Bloodwork image analysis failed."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
